Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Gretchen Birkheimer, Esq. 415-360-2885 Berman North LLP for Plaintiff.
Sehreen Ladak, Esq. 310-557-2900 Proskauer Rose LLP for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is discussed. No one opposes the tentative ruling. The parties inform the Court the hearing on 4/25/23 has been continued to 5/10/23 per stipulation of the parties. The Court announces arbitration issues will be adressed then, The Court having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MARKETERHIRE LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Off calendar. The motion to compel arbitration can be renewed, if appropriate, once the motion to file second complaint (currently set for 5/10/23) is adjudicated.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
